title: Site log
pin.title: Protected link
pin.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit PIN the construction company shared with you.
pin.label: Access PIN
pin.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
gone.title: This link is no longer active
gone.subtitle: The access expired or was disabled by the construction company. Ask them for a new link.
invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.subtitle: Check that the link is complete or ask the construction company for a new one.
list.empty.title: No published updates yet
list.empty.subtitle: When the construction company publishes the daily log, it will appear here.
error.loadFailed: The site log could not be loaded.
footer.note: Read-only view shared by the construction company · Made with BuildTrack
share.title: Share client portal
share.subtitle: Client access to {{project}}: site log, punch list and RFIs.
share.noClient: This project has no client assigned. Assign a client to share the portal.
share.loadError: The link status could not be loaded.
share.status.projectClosed: The project is not active: the link is paused until it is reactivated.
share.qrHint: The client can scan the code or open the link. No install, no account needed.
share.pin.hint: Share it separately from the link (for example, by voice).
share.pin.invalid: The PIN must be exactly 6 digits.
share.pin.badgeNote: The current PIN is kept when you regenerate the link. To change or remove it, revoke access and generate a new one.
share.pin.recommend: We recommend protecting the link with a PIN: anyone with the link can see the project’s information.
share.expiry.label: Link validity
share.regenerateNote: Regenerating makes the previous link stop working immediately.
share.revokeConfirm: Are you sure? The client will lose access
share.error: The operation could not be completed. Try again.
